HeatmapAxisNodalityTypeEnum.description: Data for Heatmaps can be node-centric (i.e. a rectangular value 'around' point (x1,y1)), or cell-centric (i.e. a value inside cell [x1,x2]x[y1,y2]). This choice has runtime implications about the expected matrix size of 'z' (see Heatmap description).

Heatmap.description:
Data on a regular 2D Cartesian grid that describes a mapping from a CoDomain value to a color. 'x' defines the x-axis-values as an array of numbers; its length defines the expected number of columns for 'z'. 'y' defines the y-axis-values as array; its length defines the expected number of rows for 'z'. The arrays 'x' and 'y' need to be sorted strictly monotonically increasing. Data can be node-centric (i.e. a value 'around' (x1,y1)), or cell-centric (i.e. a value inside cell [x1,x2]x[y1,y2]).
 For a node-centric representation, matrix size of 'z' has to be sy x sx. For a grid-centric representation, matrix size of 'z' has to be (sy-1) x (sx-1). In case 'z_im' is provided, 'z' and 'z_im' are interpreted as real and imaginary part of complex numbers.

heatmapNameUser.description: Heatmap name as given by the user, e.g. 'My_efficiency_heatmap'.

version.description: Versioning to prepare future upgrades of this schema. Must be '1'.

description: Root schema validating against all defined objects.
